meanings.definition: prevent from being seen or discovered
be or go into hiding; keep out of sight, as for protection and safety
examples: Probably his horse would be close to where he was hiding
She is hiding out in a cabin in Montana

meanings.definition: cover as if with a shroud
examples: The origins of this civilization are shrouded in mystery

meanings.definition: make undecipherable or imperceptible by obscuring or concealing

examples: in stormy weather the stars are out of sight
a hidden room or place of concealment such as a priest hole
the secret compartment in the desk
